name: list_images
description: Lists Compute Engine Images. Details for each image include name, ID, status, family, and creation timestamp. Requires project as input.

parameters.description: Request message for listing images basic info.

pageSize.description: Optional. The maximum number of images to return.

pageToken.description: Optional. A page token received from a previous call to list images.

project.description: Required. Project ID for this request.
